scripts.build: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:admin && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:apps && pnpm run build:plugins
scripts.build:backend:with-admin: pnpm run build:admin && pnpm run build:backend && node scripts/release/copy-admin-assets.mjs
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @movscript/tokens build && pnpm --filter @movscript/ui build && pnpm --filter @movscript/plugin-sdk build && pnpm --filter @movscript/draft-schemas build
scripts.build:apps: pnpm --filter movcli build && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend build && pnpm --filter movscript-admin build
scripts.package:desktop: pnpm run release:prepare-desktop && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist && pnpm run release:verify-desktop
scripts.package:desktop:mac: pnpm run release:prepare-desktop -- --platform=darwin && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist:mac && pnpm run release:verify-desktop -- --platform=darwin
scripts.package:desktop:mac:x64: pnpm run release:prepare-desktop -- --platform=darwin --arch=x64 && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist:mac:x64 && pnpm run release:verify-desktop -- --platform=darwin --arch=x64
scripts.package:desktop:mac:arm64: pnpm run release:prepare-desktop -- --platform=darwin --arch=arm64 && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist:mac:arm64 && pnpm run release:verify-desktop -- --platform=darwin --arch=arm64
scripts.package:desktop:linux:x64: pnpm run release:prepare-desktop -- --platform=linux --arch=x64 && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist:linux:x64 && pnpm run release:verify-desktop -- --platform=linux --arch=x64
scripts.package:desktop:linux:arm64: pnpm run release:prepare-desktop -- --platform=linux --arch=arm64 && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist:linux:arm64 && pnpm run release:verify-desktop -- --platform=linux --arch=arm64
scripts.package:desktop:win: pnpm run release:prepare-desktop -- --platform=win32 --arch=x64 && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist:win && pnpm run release:verify-desktop -- --platform=win32 --arch=x64
scripts.package:desktop:win:arm64: pnpm run release:prepare-desktop -- --platform=win32 --arch=arm64 && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dist:win:arm64 && pnpm run release:verify-desktop -- --platform=win32 --arch=arm64
scripts.dev:frontend: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs MOVSCRIPT_BACKEND_POLICY=external pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dev
scripts.dev:frontend:local: pnpm run build:backend:with-admin && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs MOVSCRIPT_BACKEND_POLICY=spawn MOVSCRIPT_AI_STREAM_DEBUG=1 pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dev
scripts.dev:frontend:local:external-agent: pnpm run build:backend:with-admin && node scripts/run-with-env.mjs MOVSCRIPT_BACKEND_POLICY=spawn MOVSCRIPT_AGENT_POLICY=external MOVSCRIPT_AI_STREAM_DEBUG=1 pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dev
scripts.dev:frontend:cloud: node scripts/run-with-env.mjs MOVSCRIPT_BACKEND_POLICY=cloud pnpm --filter movscript-frontend dev
scripts.test:model-capability-contract: node scripts/verify-agent-compact-contract.mjs && cd apps/backend && GOCACHE=/private/tmp/movscript-go-cache go test ./internal/infra/ai ./internal/app/aiadmin ./internal/app/job ./internal/interfaces/http/handler && cd ../.. && pnpm --filter movscript-admin test -- modelParamContract && pnpm --filter movscript-admin typecheck && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend test:generation-contract && pnpm --filter movscript-agent exec node --import tsx --test --test-name-pattern "asset candidate preparation is separated from generation execution|visual generation prompt exposes backend generation validation error codes" src/catalog/layering.test.ts && pnpm --filter movscript-agent test:generation-repair
scripts.test:agent-run-debugging: node scripts/verify-agent-run-debugging.mjs && node --test scripts/verify-agent-run-debugging-artifacts.test.mjs && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend exec node --import tsx --test src/lib/agentRunUiView.test.ts src/lib/agentGenerationUiContract.test.tsx src/lib/agentTraceDebugData.test.ts src/lib/agentPlanUi.test.ts && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend typecheck
scripts.test:agent-generation: pnpm --filter movscript-agent test && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend test:generation-replay && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend test:generation-ui && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend test:generation-e2e && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend test:generation-electron && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend typecheck
scripts.test:backend: pnpm run test:backend:unit && pnpm run test:backend:architecture
scripts.release: pnpm run release:check && pnpm run package:desktop && pnpm run release:prepare-plugins && pnpm run release:collect
scripts.release:check: pnpm run test:backend && pnpm run test:release-scripts && pnpm run test:agent-run-debugging && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter movscript-agent test && pnpm --filter movscript-frontend test && pnpm --filter movscript-admin test
scripts.release:prepare-plugins: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:plugins
